task.title: Support tester and builder roles from documentation builds
task.summary: Add optional tester/builder workflow support so agent-created tests can be derived from documentation builds and roadmap work items before code implementation, without relying on legacy duplicated requirement artifacts.

goal.outcome: The implementation loop can optionally split tester and builder roles while preserving documentation_build, roadmap, validation, and implementation_build truth boundaries.
acceptance: Implementation workflow can request a tester role from a documentation_build and roadmap work item before code changes.
Tester output focuses on tests or test-design evidence and avoids implementation changes where practical.
Builder consumes documentation_build, roadmap item, and tests, then produces implementation evidence after checks pass.
Implementation_build distinguishes test-design evidence, code-change evidence, checks, acceptance mapping, and validation refs.
Validation gateway can review tester/builder split without requiring separate agents for every task.
non_goals: Do not always require separate agents for every task.
Do not implement a generic multi-agent framework.
Do not revive legacy duplicated requirement artifacts as requirements briefs.
verification: Update skill/tool docs for tester/builder inputs and outputs
Run stale grep for roadmap-work-item terminology
Exercise workflow on a small task or dry-run with documented evidence mapping.

summary: TASK-046 implemented: implementation builds and workflow docs now distinguish optional tester and builder evidence derived from documentation builds and roadmap work items.

evidence: Tester role consumes source documentation build plus roadmap item before code changes.
Smoke test now asserts role_evidence.tester, test_design_evidence, and source_documentation_build linkage.
notes: Tester output should be tests or test-design evidence and avoid implementation changes where practical.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Builder role consumes tester evidence and records code_change_evidence plus role_evidence.builder.
writeImplementationBuild emits separated role evidence and compact handoff context.
notes: Builder output should be code changes plus checks until acceptance passes.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Tester role consumes source documentation build plus roadmap item before code changes.
Smoke test now asserts role_evidence.tester, test_design_evidence, and source_documentation_build linkage.
code_change_evidence: Builder role consumes tester evidence and records code_change_evidence plus role_evidence.builder.
writeImplementationBuild emits separated role evidence and compact handoff context.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Implementation workflow can request a tester role from a documentation_build and roadmap work item before code changes.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: skills/codewiki-task/SKILL.md and compilers.md define tester inputs as documentation build + roadmap item; smoke input includes source_documentation_build and asserts tester linkage.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Tester output focuses on tests or test-design evidence and avoids implementation changes where practical.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: CodewikiBuildToolInput/schema accepts test_design_evidence and tester_notes; implementation_build.role_evidence.tester records test files/evidence/boundary.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Builder consumes documentation_build, roadmap item, and tests, then produces implementation evidence after checks pass.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: implementation_build.role_evidence.builder records source_documentation_build, roadmap_task_id, code_files, code_change_evidence, and builder_notes.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Implementation_build distinguishes test-design evidence, code-change evidence, checks, acceptance mapping, and validation refs.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: writeImplementationBuild emits test_design_evidence, code_change_evidence, role_evidence, checks_run, acceptance_mapping, and validation_refs as separate fields.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Validation gateway can review tester/builder split without requiring separate agents for every task.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Docs state split is optional; validator contract includes tester evidence and builder evidence.

risks: Tester/builder split is optional and evidence-based; no generic multi-agent framework added.

commit.title: feat(builds): distinguish tester and builder evidence
commit.body: Implementation builds now separate tester/test-design evidence from builder/code-change evidence, with docs and smoke coverage aligned to documentation_build + roadmap item truth.

pr.title: feat(builds): distinguish tester and builder evidence
pr.body: Implementation builds now separate tester/test-design evidence from builder/code-change evidence, with docs and smoke coverage aligned to documentation_build + roadmap item truth.

validation_verdict.rationale: Implementation alignment and checks pass for TASK-046.
